ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits or views for the content */,
  "modified" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last modified */,
  "object_pk" INTEGER /* Primary key of the object being tracked (e.g., article, video, image) */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type (e.g., article, video, image) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the content */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the content */,
  "views_by_device" TEXT /* JSON object to track views by device type */,
  "views_by_source" TEXT /* JSON object to track views by source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., article, video, image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the content category (e.g., sports, news, entertainment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_assignments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being assigned */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_assignments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "recommended_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended content */,
  "score" REAL /* Relevance score of the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_recommended_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, like, share) */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
